---
title: "Resources"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    page-layout: full
---

::::::::::: {.grid .gap-3}
:::::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-4}
::::: {.card .h-100}
::: card-header
Labs
:::

::: card-body
##### Weekly Lab Setup {.card-title}

Learn how to set up your lab project in Posit Cloud each week.

[Weekly Lab Setup](weekly-lab-setup.qmd)
:::
:::::
::::::


:::::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-4}
::::: {.card .h-100}
::: card-header
EDA Project
:::

::: card-body
##### How to Export a Graph from RStudio for a Poster {.card-title}

A practical guide to making poster-ready figures in R with ggplot2 and exporting them at fixed dimensions using ggsave().

[How to Export a Graph from RStudio for a Poster](export-ggplot.qmd)
:::
:::::
::::::


:::::::::::
